---
title: "Privacy Law Roundup — May 16, 2026"
date: 2026-05-16 11:09:14 +0530
categories: [news, roundup]
tags: [dpdpa, india, privacy, global, news]
---

## India: DPDPA Legal Challenges
The Supreme Court has issued notices concerning multiple petitions that challenge the constitutionality of India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDPA) 2023 and the recently notified DPDPA Rules, 2025. These challenges, brought by groups like the Reporters Collective and the RTI Forum, scrutinize the Act's implications for transparency and fundamental rights. The court's decision to hear these pleas indicates ongoing legal scrutiny of the new data protection framework. ([Source](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.?oc=5))

## India: DPDPA Implementation & Compliance
As the DPDPA officially comes into effect, businesses across India are grappling with the practicalities of compliance, with the DPDPA Rules 2025 providing the framework for operationalizing the Act's principles. This new legislation marks India's first comprehensive data protection law, necessitating significant adjustments in data handling practices, including designing compliant consent interfaces for e-commerce platforms. Technology providers are responding with new services and partnerships aimed at helping Indian enterprises manage the data protection burden, though concerns remain about readiness, particularly among startups. ([Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirwFBVV95cUxQOUo0SlZXTjVDUVN4MG41cDh0QTkzaFIydi15c1gzNHVQVDllNm84WjdJS2JVM0ZUS2dmNjZlY205amc1aWxnWV81MXc5ZTFUWWFLdXZPM3c5UTRWMnVONDBUcnB4TzhpODEySHc1X0JvYWpkLTZpb3MwVnJMd3J0QkhQN1o0OUE4R0hMSk1lSlRTZ2dKRW56N0VQc3YtWUtlZW90UnlsZGlXVXFtZTI4?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxNdGdEQmRWbmMxZ0JtVlgweDg0ZjFiZFBSd3FkbVdTajV5WkU0ZVowSzRjd182RlAtUTU5a0d3dW91UGdOX29MZ3ZUR3pHR2YtcURGNXpqM2drMXpWWnYzYnRiZ3l2VHl4YXdWVzhPUmxBREh1SWFtV0EzbWJEZkN3SG5WcjhTUG05V242ZzFPZjRicThjbEZUa3lobHdkbzh3R2VPMTdOeWdkemR5YmxGS2JjTlJnNmRrQm9BaVFNMFg2emc?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMixwFBVV95cUxNZG5MSDhBRmpzczRjbkh2b1F3SFljbGl3VlEzMkFnYnZkNTJ4VTI4bkpuZmtSV3lqbTRiV3d6YWFmdnJTVS1sVklTcGM2U2NzQXBIV0pQWU9UZEYxQW15VEE5SWpLNGlfVXdqbWR3QzFaVU9lVXkxeHU3dGxYRTZRWGU1djh3c3VBQkx3WnduTlZpaElqM1ZYYzNtTEdJOGpybEZkbS1XZElzMWR6Z3BKd1hZcTFmNXl4b1d6VmRXd3hyWmxzOXB3?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.?oc=5), [Source](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMijAFBVV95cUxOSjQwcU1oTFlXZ0taQmdGQzI1dm5ralhINFUyTjlZNzZtYmg1b0JuYUZydDZlOVlfemQ1MU5LVl9RVDF5a2QyNWI2bXZWcXByTFJRYmszRmpRZnE4
